_comment: Pelican Panel Egg for Surya Discord Matchmaking Bot
name: Surya Discord Bot (TypeScript)
author: custom
description: Discord.js v14 TypeScript bot for matchmaking and game room management. Automatically builds TypeScript to JavaScript and runs the compiled code.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; npm install; echo 'Building TypeScript...'; npm run build; echo 'Starting bot...'; npm run start

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Surya Discord Bot Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool

echo -e "Updating npm to latest version..."
npm install npm@latest --location=global

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "User upload mode - skipping git clone"
else
    ## Add git ending if it's not on the address
    if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
        GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
    fi

    if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
        echo -e "Using anonymous git clone"
    else
        GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
    fi

    ## Pull git repo
    if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
        echo -e "/mnt/server directory is not empty."
        if [ -d .git ]; then
            echo -e ".git directory exists"
            if [ -f .git/config ]; then
                echo -e "Loading info from git config"
                ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
            else
                echo -e "Files found with no git config"
                echo -e "Exiting to avoid breaking existing files"
                exit 10
            fi
        fi

        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from git repository"
            git pull
        fi
    else
        echo -e "/mnt/server is empty.\nCloning repository..."
        if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
            echo -e "Cloning default branch"
            git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
        else
            echo -e "Cloning branch: ${BRANCH}"
            git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
        fi
    fi
fi

echo "Installing Node.js dependencies..."
if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    /usr/local/bin/npm install
else
    echo "ERROR: package.json not found!"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Building TypeScript project..."
if [ -f /mnt/server/tsconfig.json ]; then
    /usr/local/bin/npm run build
    if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
        echo "TypeScript build successful!"
    else
        echo "ERROR: TypeScript build failed!"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "WARNING: tsconfig.json not found, skipping build"
fi

echo "Writing .env from panel variables..."
cat > /mnt/server/.env <<EOF
# Auto-generated by Pelican installation script
DISCORD_TOKEN=${DISCORD_TOKEN}
DISCORD_CLIENT_ID=${DISCORD_CLIENT_ID}

GUILD_IDS=${GUILD_IDS}
MATCH_CATEGORY_IDS=${MATCH_CATEGORY_IDS}
STATUS_CHANNEL_IDS=${STATUS_CHANNEL_IDS}
LOG_CHANNEL_IDS=${LOG_CHANNEL_IDS}

STAFF_ROLE_IDS=${STAFF_ROLE_IDS}
PREMIUM_ROLE_ID=${PREMIUM_ROLE_ID}
WAITING_VC_ROLE_ID=${WAITING_VC_ROLE_ID}

WAITING_VC_CHANNEL_IDS=${WAITING_VC_CHANNEL_IDS}
BETTING_VC_CHANNEL_IDS=${BETTING_VC_CHANNEL_IDS}

DEFAULT_MATCH_FORMAT=${DEFAULT_MATCH_FORMAT}
MATCH_TIMEOUT_MINUTES=${MATCH_TIMEOUT_MINUTES}
AUTO_DELETE_CHANNELS_DELAY_SECONDS=${AUTO_DELETE_CHANNELS_DELAY_SECONDS}

MIN_PLAYERS_1V1=2
MIN_PLAYERS_2V2=4
MIN_PLAYERS_3V3=6
MIN_PLAYERS_4V4=8

NODE_ENV=production
LOG_LEVEL=info
EOF

echo -e "Installation complete!"
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description:
GitHub repository URL for the Surya bot.
Example: https://github.com/yourusername/Surya-Bot

variables.name: Install Branch
variables.description: Git branch to install (leave empty for default branch)

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username for private repositories (optional)

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description:
Personal Access Token for private repositories (optional).
Create at: https://github.com/settings/tokens

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description:
Automatically pull latest changes from git on startup.
0 = disabled, 1 = enabled

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description:
Skip git clone if you manually upload files.
0 = use git (default), 1 = manual upload

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from https://discord.com/developers/applications

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: Your Discord application/client ID

variables.name: Guild IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated Discord server (guild) IDs where the bot operates

variables.name: Match Category IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated IDs of Discord categories where match channels are created

variables.name: Staff Role IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated role IDs that have staff/admin access to bot commands

variables.name: Waiting VC Channel IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated IDs of voice channels players must be in to join a queue

variables.name: Status Channel IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated IDs of channels where the bot posts live queue status

variables.name: Log Channel IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated IDs of channels where match results are logged

variables.name: Betting VC Channel IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated IDs of voice channels used for betting match queues

variables.name: Premium Role ID
variables.description: Role ID for premium users (optional)

variables.name: Waiting VC Role ID
variables.description: Role ID assigned to players waiting for a match (optional)

variables.name: Default Match Format
variables.description: Default match format: 1v1, 2v2, 3v3 or 4v4

variables.name: Match Timeout (minutes)
variables.description: How many minutes before an inactive match is auto-cancelled

variables.name: Auto Delete Channels Delay (seconds)
variables.description: How many seconds after a match ends before channels are deleted
